# Feature: session-start

> Scope: scripts/session-start.sh

## What it does

SessionStart hook that clears stale runtime state at the beginning of each Claude Code session. Removes the invariant write lock file so no bypass persists across sessions.

## Rules

- RULE-1: On execution, removes `.purlin/runtime/invariant_write_lock` if it exists
- RULE-2: Always exits with code 0, even if the runtime directory does not exist

## Proof

- PROOF-1 (RULE-1): After execution with a lock file present, the lock file no longer exists
- PROOF-2 (RULE-2): Running when `.purlin/runtime/` does not exist produces exit code 0
